ie.updateNote: Passengers are advised not to travel to the province of Cabo Delgado and certain parts of Nampula in northern Mozambique, due to an ongoing violent insurgency involving armed attacks on local civilians and security forces since October 2017. Please see Safety and Security Tab for further details and information.
